title: NASCAR Names POET Official Bioethanol Partner, Becomes First Major Motorsports Series to Utilize Zero-Carbon Bioethanol
content: NASCAR announced a landmark partnership with POET, the worldâ€™s largest producer of biofuels, naming the company the Official Bioethanol Partner of NASCAR. As part of the agreement, NASCAR will become the first major motorsports series to utilize zero-carbon bioethanol in combination with its existing fuel partner Sunoco, reinforcing the sportâ€™s commitment to innovation, performance and healthy environments in accordance with its NASCAR IMPACT goals. The partnership also delivers two highly visible integrations across NASCAR. Beginning this season, POET will serve as the sponsor of the â€œPOET Restart Zoneâ€ at all NASCAR-owned tracks, bringing the brand into one of the most intense and action-packed moments of each race. Additionally, POET branding will appear on all NASCAR fuel cans, alongside long-time Official NASCAR Fuel Partner Sunoco, further embedding bioethanol into the sportâ€™s competitive fabric. â€œThe partnership with POET reflects our commitment to leverage our platform as a real-world proving ground for innovation,â€ said Eric Nyquist, Chief Impact Officer, NASCAR. â€œAs the worldâ€™s largest biofuel producer, POETâ€™s industry-leading technology will bring zero-carbon bioethanol to our Sunoco race fuel blend, helping to drive performance on and off the track for NASCAR.â€
author: Analysts Account
